title: cleistogenes polyphylla
intro: Cleistogenes polyphylla, also known as the tufted grass or Chinese bush grass, is a type of perennial plant native to East Asia, characterized by its dense tufts of grass-like leaves and small yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleistogenes polyphylla include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to prepare tonics and other remedies.
